subcodes.first_line: O Báqir! With the eye of truth gaze thou upon the Most Great Scene, and with pure and sanctified ears hearken unto the call of the one Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا باقر ببصر حق بمنظر اکبر ناظر باش و باذن طاهره مقدسه ندای محبوب یکتا را بشنو
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
